====Pokémon====
This listing is of Will's Pokémon in the Pokémon Adventures manga.

=====On hand=====
{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Will
|pkmn=Xatu
|stage1=Natu
|type1=Psychic
|type2=Flying
|img=Will Natu Psychic Adventures.png
|cap=Will's Natu
|img2=Will Xatu Adventures.png
|epnum=PS173
|epname=The Last Battle VII
|desc={{p|Xatu}} is Will's first known Pokémon. It was first used to attack Green at the Ilex Forest. Green's fear of birds prevented her from fighting back. Later, it was used against {{adv|Silver}} while on Lugia's back. After being weakened by a {{m|Beat Up}} from Silver's entire team, Xatu was defeated by a {{m|Return}} from [[Silver's Feraligatr]]. In ''[[PS268|The Escape]]'', it was revealed to have evolved from a {{p|Natu}}.

Xatu's only known move is {{m|Psychic}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Will
|pkmn=Exeggutor
|type1=Grass
|type2=Psychic
|img=Will Exeggutor Adventures.png
|img_size=120px
|epnum=PS443
|epname=Attaway, Aipom!
|desc={{p|Exeggutor}} first appeared alongside its Trainer at the [[Pokéathlon]]. It was used to challenge Gold in the Goal Roll event, where it easily won.

None of Exeggutor's moves are known.}}

=====Borrowed=====
{{TrainerPoké
|main=Tower duo (Adventures)
|trainer=Masked Man
|pkmn=Lugia
|type1=Psychic
|type2=Flying
|img=Masked Man Lugia.png
|epnum=PS088
|epname=The Beedrill All and End All
|desc=The Masked Man lent {{p|Lugia}} to Will in order to guard the [[Ilex Forest]]. Will used Lugia to battle {{adv|Green}}, {{adv|Red}}, and {{adv|Blue}}, who used {{p|Articuno}}, {{p|Zapdos}}, and {{p|Moltres}}, respectively. During the battle, many Pokémon sent from people from Kanto and Johto came to assist. The Pokémon latched on to Lugia and {{p|Ho-Oh}}, and their combined power freed the two from the Masked Man's control. Now freed, Lugia and Ho-Oh flew off to parts unknown.}}
